business challenges and data landscape.", features=[ "Data pipeline design", "Model architecture", "Training & fine-tuning", "Deployment & monitoring", ], ), Service( id=3, title="AI Integration", name="Starter", price=49.0, period="month", description="Perfect for small teams exploring AI capabilities.", features=[ "5,000 API calls/month", "2 AI models", "Email support", "Basic analytics", ], popular=False, ), PricingPlan( id=2, name="Professional", price=149.0, period="month", description="For growing businesses that need robust AI power.", features=[ "50,000 API calls/month", "10 AI models", "Priority support", "Advanced analytics", "Custom fine-tuning", "Team collaboration", ], popular=True, ), PricingPlan( id=3, name="Enterprise", price=499.0, period="month", description="Full-scale AI infrastructure for demanding workloads.", features=[ "Unlimited API calls", "Unlimited models", "24/7 dedicated support", "Custom model development", "SLA guarantee", "On-premise deployment", "Dedicated account manager", ], popular=False, ), ] # ── Testimonials ───────────────────────────────────────── @router.get("/testimonials", response_model=list[Testimonial]) async def get_testimonials(): return [ Testimonial( id=1, name="Sarah Chen", role="CTO", company="TechVault", content="NeuralForge transformed our customer support with AI agents that resolve 80% of Their team understood our domain deeply and delivered beyond expectations.", rating=5, ), Testimonial( id=3, name="Dr. Aisha Patel", role="Head of Research", company="BioGen Labs", content="Their custom model for protein structure prediction cut our research cycle from weeks to hours. Truly groundbreaking work.", rating=5, ), ] # ── Stats ──────────────────────────────────────────────── @router.get("/stats", response_model=StatsData) async def get_stats(): return StatsData( clients=250, projects=1200, accuracy=99, uptime=99, ) # ── Contact Form ───────────────────────────────────────── @router.post("/contact", response_model=ApiResponse) async def submit_contact(form: ContactForm): try: await save_contact(form) return ApiResponse( success=True, message="Thank you for reaching out! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.", ) except Exception as e: raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(e)) # ── Newsletter ──────────────────────────────────────────── @router.post("/newsletter", response_model=ApiResponse) async def subscribe_newsletter(signup: NewsletterSignup): try: await save_newsletter(signup.email) return ApiResponse( success=True, message="Welcome aboard! You'll receive our latest AI insights and updates.", ) except Exception as e: raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(e)) # ── Contacts (admin) ───────────────────────────────────── "/home/neeraj/Downloads/agent_forge/agentforge/workspace/cmqex953e0000sb5thsu8ca0d/backend/database.py", "relativePath": "backend/database.py", "content": "from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, Text, DateTime, create_engine from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import create_async_engine, AsyncSession from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker from datetime import datetime import os DATABASE_URL = os.getenv("DATABASE_URL", "sqlite+aiosqlite:///./neuralforge.db") engine = create_async_engine(DATABASE_URL, echo=False) async_session = sessionmaker(engine, class_=AsyncSession, expire_on_commit=False) Base = declarative_base() class ContactMessage(Base): __tablename__ = "contacts" id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True) name = Column(String(255), nullable=False) email = Column(String(255), nullable=False) subject = Column(String(500), nullable=False) message = Column(Text, nullable=False) created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow) class NewsletterSubscriber(Base): __tablename__ = "newsletter" id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True) email = Column(String(255), unique=True, nullable=False) subscribed_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow) async def create_tables(): async with engine.begin() as conn: await conn.run_sync(Base.metadata.create_all) async def save_contact(form): async with async_session() as session: contact = ContactMessage( name=form.name, email=form.email, subject=form.subject, message=form.message, ) session.add(contact) await session.commit() await session.refresh(contact) return contact async def save_newsletter(email: str): async with async_session() as session: existing = await session.execute( NewsletterSubscriber.__table__.select().where( NewsletterSubscriber.email == email ) ) if existing.fetchone(): return None subscriber = NewsletterSubscriber(email=email) session.add(subscriber) await session.commit() await session.refresh(subscriber) return subscriber async def get_contacts(): async with async_session() as session: result = await session.execute(ContactMessage.__table__.select()) rows = result.fetchall() return [ { "id": row[0], "name": row[1], "email": row[2], "subject": row[3], "message": row[4], "created_at": str(row[5]), } for row in rows ] " } [TOOL_RESULT] read_file { "path": "/home/neeraj/Downloads/agent_forge/agentforge/workspace/cmqex953e0000sb5thsu8ca0d/frontend/package.json", "relativePath":
